positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest pattern, depicting oversized bioluminescent flora integrated with constellations and nebula dust. The composition is centered and repeating, featuring abstract, glowing leaf veins and crescent moon shapes formed by interlocking geometric lines. Use deep indigo, cosmic violet, emerald green, and touches of metallic gold foil accents. The style should be highly detailed line art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, giving a strong, contrasting silhouette suitable for a repeating fabric print. Studio shot, clean background, high contrast.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, disfigured, bad anatomy, out of frame, noise, extra limbs, messy
